companies.name: Apple
companies.latest_info: WWDC 2026 set for June 8-12, 2026. CEO Tim Cook recently visited Beijing.

companies.name: NVIDIA
companies.latest_info: GTC Taipei/COMPUTEX keynote scheduled for June 1-4, 2026. CEO Jensen Huang visited Beijing. US approved H200 sales to some Chinese firms.

companies.name: Huawei
companies.latest_info: Launched 950PR AI chip with strong local orders from ByteDance and Alibaba. Global ICT Competition finals June 2-5, 2026 in Shenzhen.

companies.name: ByteDance
companies.latest_info: Planning massive $5.6 billion purchase of Huawei AI chips in 2026. Investing over $30 billion in AI infrastructure.

companies.name: Alibaba
companies.latest_info: Planning to order Huawei 950PR chips; also approved for newly licensed Nvidia H200 chips. Expanding cloud capabilities across Asia.
